race.comment: ARIANNA'S GOLD (9) resumes and has placed 2/2 fresh. Has been unlucky to have broken through and has plenty of scope for improvement. Each way despite the tricky gate. KHALEESI'S DREAM (14) debuts for the Trinder yard. Got a lot closer in her latest Longford trial and she looks a likely type. Draws awkwardly but the top hoop is aboard. WALKING STREET (8) debuts and has looked the goods at the trials. Will also need a touch of luck but a bold effort is likely. BLACK RAPTOR (10) placed at Hobart on debut and can build on that. LIGHT FORCE (3) resumed improved and will also be around the mark with the extra fitness.
